title: Conduct laboratory-based acceptance tests for construction materials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct laboratory-based acceptance tests for construction materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for laboratory-based acceptance tests

pcs.text: Access relevant job instructions from laboratory information management system (LIMS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access relevant job instructions from laboratory information management system (LIMS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access relevant job instructions from laboratory information management system (LIMS).

pcs.text: Interpret test request to confirm samples to be tested, the test method and equipment involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret test request to confirm samples to be tested, the test method and equipment involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret test request to confirm samples to be tested, the test method and equipment involved.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment.

pcs.text: Assemble all required equipment and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble all required equipment and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble all required equipment and materials.

pcs.text: Plan work sequences for optimum efficiency and/or throughput of multiple samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan work sequences for optimum efficiency and/or throughput of multiple samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan work sequences for optimum efficiency and/or throughput of multiple samples.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for laboratory-based acceptance tests

elements.title: Prepare samples or test pieces

pcs.text: Retrieve samples and/or test pieces from storage and record their general appearance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve samples and/or test pieces from storage and record their general appearance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the accuracy and completeness of accompanying labels and documentation to ensure traceability.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that the storage/curing conditions of samples and/or test pieces were appropriate.

pcs.text: Compare samples and/or test pieces with test specifications, record observations and report discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare samples and/or test pieces with test specifications, record observations and report discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare samples and/or test pieces with test specifications, record observations and report discrepancies.

pcs.text: Prepare samples and/or test pieces in accordance with appropriate test method

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare samples and/or test pieces in accordance with appropriate test method.
